channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — May 27, 2026
item.description: Illness, which is really “not-right-mindedness,” is the result of level confusion in the sense that it always entails the belief that what is amiss in one level can adversely affect another.We have constantly referred to miracles as the means of correcting level confusion, and all mistakes must be corrected at the level on which they occur. Only the MIND is capable of error. The body can ACT erron

item.title: Lesson 39: “My holiness is my salvation.”
item.description: “My holiness is my salvation.” If guilt is hell, what is its opposite? Like the text for which this workbook was written, the ideas which are used for the exercises are very simple, very clear and totally unambiguous. We are not concerned with intellectual feats nor logical toys.We are dealing only in the very obvious, which has been overlooked in the clouds of complexity in which you think you th
